metadata.name: Review a Major ERP Implementation Project

description: An auditor is reviewing a large, in-progress ERP implementation project to assess its risks.

nodes.task_description: Review the project charter and budget to understand the project's goals and financial scope.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor understands the stated objectives of the project.

nodes.task_description: Review the project status reports and steering committee meeting minutes for the last 6 months.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor identifies that the project is currently behind schedule and over budget.

nodes.task_description: Interview the project manager to understand the root causes of the delays and cost overruns.

expected_outcome.value: The project manager attributes the issues to scope creep and inadequate resource planning.
